title: PG Discovery & Management Platform
summary: Built a full-stack PG accommodation discovery portal with an owner CMS for property, room, bed, and guest management.
description: Full-stack platform for discovering and managing Paying Guest accommodations
outcomes: Launched a live MVP indexing 50+ PG properties across 4 cities
Enabled property owners to manage inventory with zero technical knowledge
Achieved sub-second page loads on public discovery pages
